title: Massachusetts museums embrace tech for immersive history tours
description: As the 250th anniversary approaches, museums and historical tours around Massachusetts have evolved to incorporate modern technology like artificial intelligence in their tourism.
content:
Today, in museums across the state, people can experience what historic sites used to look like, have a conversation with Frederick Douglass, and virtually fire a cannon at a British ship.

description: Artificial intelligence (AI) cameras are being used across England to detect drivers using a mobile phone or not wearing a seatbelt.
content:

title: Is AI replacing tech workers or providing an excuse for job cuts?
description: Tech industry layoffs are accelerating, and executives have been quick to say it’s because their companies are doing more with artificial intelligence, even when there may be more to it.
content:
SAN FRANCISCO — Meta, Coinbase, and Block have each laid off at least 10% of their employees in recent months and partly blamed artificial intelligence. About 13,000 jobs were eliminated among the three companies.
